title: YMCA EXIT — Papa whispers
prompt: Medium shot in @ymca-gym entrance area. @Mama on the LEFT stands by the door looking HOLLOW-eyed, towel around her neck, hair frizzy. @Papa on the RIGHT stands right next to her, gym bag over his shoulder. Papa (low whisper, concerned): "How long since your last cup?" Mama (slow, distant, staring into space): "Don't ask me that." Papa (carefully): "...should I drive?" Mama (deadly serious, finally looking at him): "Yes."
